output.code:
# Let's read the file at the given path to analyze.
path = "/mnt/data/file-XSsgpX1e1XsZqbZkBfndHs-text_to_analyse.txt"
try:
    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        raw = f.read()
        print("Read length:", len(raw))
        print(raw[:1000])
except Exception as e:
    print("Error:", e)

# Let's search for the ayah and hadith spans in the raw string.
text = raw

ayah_span = "يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَىٰ وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوبًا وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ"
# The hadith span is the entire text inside the first quotes after "قول النبي"
hadith_span = "لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللّهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللّهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالاَبَاءِ. إِنّمَا هُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ تَقيّ وَفَاجِرٌ شَقيّ. النّاسُ كُلّهُمْ بَنُو آدَمَ. وآدَمُ خُلِقَ مِنَ تُرَابِ"
# Check if ayah_span exists:
print("Ayah found:", ayah_span in text)
print("Hadith found:", hadith_span in text)
# Find the index
idx_ayah = text.find(ayah_span)
idx_hadith = text.find(hadith_span)
idx_ayah, idx_hadith

start_ayah = idx_ayah
end_ayah = idx_ayah + len(ayah_span)
start_hadith = idx_hadith
end_hadith = idx_hadith + len(hadith_span)
print(raw[start_ayah:end_ayah] == ayah_span)
print(raw[start_hadith:end_hadith] == hadith_span)
# Let's inspect edges to see if there are trailing spaces
print("Ayah snippet around edges:")
print(raw[start_ayah-20:start_ayah+len(ayah_span)+20])
print("Hadith snippet around edges:")
print(raw[start_hadith-20:start_hadith+len(hadith_span)+20])

start_ayah = idx_ayah
end_ayah = idx_ayah + len(ayah_span)
start_hadith = idx_hadith
end_hadith = idx_hadith + len(hadith_span)
start_ayah, end_ayah, start_hadith, end_hadith

# Find all occurrences of ayah_span and hadith_span in the text
def all_occurrences(s, sub):
    idxs = []
    i = s.find(sub)
    while i != -1:
        idxs.append(i)
        i = s.find(sub, i+1)
    return idxs

ayah_positions = all_occurrences(text, ayah_span)
hadith_positions = all_occurrences(text, hadith_span)
len(ayah_positions), ayah_positions[:5], len(hadith_positions), hadith_positions[:5]
